item.title: Have you considered that China?
item.description:
Have you considered that China? One of the most planned economies in the world is not having an unintended accidental consequence but maybe their citizens doing better and their growth being high is…. The point.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Homonationalism is essential two of Israeli propaganda, because if they failed to maintain it then they wouldn’t be able to demo...
item.description:
Homonationalism is essential two of Israeli propaganda, because if they failed to maintain it then they wouldn’t be able to demonise those they characterise as not having it#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s always interesting that their analysis is generally accurate but completely inverted
item.description:
It’s always interesting that their analysis is generally accurate but completely inverted. And by the way, this is not to say Latinos and Cubans are not targeted by that fascism, but actually that that targeting is enabled by these dynamics#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
